response.step_by_step_log: The video was scanned for on-screen text and audio. It contains no vocal music, only instrumental background music (or no music at all). The on-screen text consists of event information ('hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams'), safety instructions, and fan messages. Since there is no vocal music, no lyric search was required or performed.
response.global_summary: This video displays a promotional image for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' with a list of penlight colors, followed by a series of fan-submitted messages and illustrations. There is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: A slide showing an 'Attention' notice for visitors, including instructions about flashing lights and cheering, over a background of floating penlights.
A table detailing the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' penlight colors for various talents.
A promotional image for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event, featuring a large group illustration of many hololive talents.
A montage of fan-submitted messages, illustrations, and art for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event, continuing until the end of the video.
